titleStmt.title: SII 23.392: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 392. (A.R. No. 392 of 1907.) Maruttuvakkuḍi, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Airāvatēśvara temple—on the south wall of the same maṇḍapa Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa III: year 16: 1192-93 A.D.

summary.p: The king's name is preceded by the expressions ‘who having taken Madurai was pleased to take the crowned head of the Pāṇḍya’. The inscription is damaged in places. This seems to record an order from the king issued to the revenue officers to enter into the tax registers certain lands which had been added to the dēvadāna lands at Dānavinōdanallūr after their purchase by one Vijayālaya-Pallavaraiyaṉ (original name, Arayaṉ Ediriliśōḻaṉ) of Pālaivāyil in Iṅga-nāḍu a division of Arumoḻidēva-vaḷanāḍu. The record gives a detailed account of the amount of paddy yield from the lands, 4 vēli in extent. The new gift seems to have been made by the donor in payment of the iṟai due on the tirumaḍaiviḷāgam, the flower garden and the path-way (for the passage of the person fetching water for the sacred bath of the god) from the river Kāvēri, all of which were undertaken by him. The owners from whom the purchase was made were Araiyan Tillai nāyakaṉ alias Kāḍuveṭṭi the headman of Veṇkuḍippākkam, the ‘mēlvēṭṭappēṟu’ of Śivapādaśēkharanallūr and the two Jaina temples Chēdikulamāṇikka-perumbaḷḷi and Gaṅgakulasundara-perumbaḷḷi at Jananāthapuram and Kāṟāyil Ponnambalanāthaṉ alias Gaṇḍarāditta-Pallavaraiyaṉ of Iḷaiyāṉkuḍi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ maturai koṇṭu pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalai koṇṭaruḷiṉa śrī kulottuṅka coḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 10 6Āvatu
tiripuvaṉaccakkaravatti koṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu tiraimurnāṭṭu Āṉaiccūḻt tiruviṭaikkuḷamuṭaiyā
rkoyilil tevarkaṉmikkum śrīmāheśvarakkaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum śrī kāriyam ceyvāṉukkum Arumoḻi tevavaḷanāṭṭu Iṅkaṇā
ṭṭup pālaivāyiluṭaiyāṉ Arayaṉ Etirili coḻaṉāṉa vicaiya ṉ Ittevar tirumaṭaiviḷākam perttu ceyyavum tirunanta
vaṉaṅkaḷum kāveriyiṉiṉṟum tirumañcaṇa nirvaravaḻiyākavum ceyta nilattu Iṟaikaṭṭukku Uṭalāṉa ṉilattu Akappaṭ
ṭa Āṉaiccūḻp parikkirakattārai kuṭiyiruppumāṟi veṇkuṭippākkiḻāṉ Araiyaṉ tillaināyakaṉāṉa kāṭuveṭṭi pirasātakkāṇiyāka peṟṟa nila
māy Ivaṉ pakkalum melveṭṭappeṟāṉa civapātacekaraṉ nallūrilum jaṉanātapurattu cetikulamāṇikkap perumpaḷḷikkum kaṅkakula cuntarap perumpa
ḷḷikkum paḷḷiccantam Iḷaiyāṉkuṭiyilum Iḷaiyāṉkuṭaiyāṉ kāṟā yil poṉṉampalanātaṉāṉa kaṇṭarātitta pallavaraiyaṉ pakkalum vilaikoṇṭa piramāṇappaṭi
nilam Ittevar tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka kuṭuttu niṅkalāka Iṭṭuk kūṭukiṟa nilattu Ūṟkaṇakku Āṉaiccūḻ ttukkaṇakku pparik kirakattāraik kuṭi
iruppu māṟiṉa Ivvūr kollai nilam Araiyum kacekaranallūril nilam Orumā muntirikaiyum Iḷaiyāṉkuṭiyil nilam Orumāvarai Araikkā
ṇiyum Āka nilam Araiye Irumāvaraiye Araikkāṇi Iḷai yāṉkuṭiyiniṉṟum kūṭukiṟa nilam paḷḷiccantam Iṟaiyiliyāy varukiṟa paṭiyum
Āṉaiccūḻniṉṟum kūṭukiṟa nilam parikkirakattā tuk kāṇiyāka Iṭṭu varukiṟapaṭiyum tavirntu patiṉāṟāvatumutal Ittevar teva
tāṉam Iṉṉāṭṭu tāṉaviṉota nallū paṭiyum Eṟiṉa nilam Araiye Irumāvarai Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum nikki nikkiniṉṟa nilattile
Oṉṟeeḻumākkāṇi mu kaṭṭukkuṭa tavirntu Ittevark ku
varavaḻiyākavum patiṉāṟāvatu mutal niṅka nikkiyum variyilārum varik kūṟu ceyvārkaḷu
ṅkalāka Aṉupavikka. Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantiraolai muventaveḷāṉ Ivai kurukula rāya�
pūlokapurantarappallavaraya ṉeḻuttu ttaraya ṉeḻutteṉṟu
patiṉāṟāvatu nāḷ Eḻupattāṟiṉāl puṟappaṭṭa
kaṭṭiṉapaṭi niṅkalāka niṅkiṉapaṭikku Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭu
ttiraimūrnāṭṭu Āṉaiccūḻt tiruviṭaikkuḷamuṭaiyār tevatāṉam tāṉavi
ṉotanallūr nilam nālveliyiṉāl kāṇikkaṭaṉ nellu ympa tiṉkala
ṉe patakkoru nāḻi Uri Iṟai muṉpu Iṟuttuvarukiṟa nellu
mun nūṟṟu Eḻupattu Irukalaṉe mukkuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyiṉāl pattā ṟākki nellu Irunū
ṟṟu Irupattu mukkalaṉe tūṇi muṉṉāḻi kācu Oṉṟekāle Araimā muntirikai
yiṉāl nāṟkalappaṭi nellu Aiyṅkalaṉe kuṟuṇi Irunāḻi mūvuḻakku Akkam patte
Iraṇṭumākkāṇiyiṉāl Eḻukuṟuṇi nāṉāḻippaṭi nellu Aṟukalaṉe mukkuṟu
ṇi Aṟunāḻi Uḻakku Āka nellu Irunūṟṟu muppattu nāṟkalaṉe Iru tūṇik kuṟuṇi
kuṟuṇi nāṉā
ḻi Ivvūroṭum Arumoḻitevavaḷanāṭṭu Iṅkaṇāṭṭup pālaivāyilu
ṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ Etirilicoḻaṉāṉa vicaiyālayappallavarayaṉ Itte
var tirumaṭaiviḷākam perttuc ceyyavum tirunantavaṉamākavum kāveriyilni
ṉṟum tirumañcaṉam vara vaḻiyākavum ceyta nilattu Iṟaikaṭṭukkuṭalāṉa ni
lattu Akappaṭṭa Āṉaiccūḻp parikkirakattārai kuṭi Iruppu māṟiveṅkuṭimpākki
ḻāṉ Araiyaṉ tillai nāyakaṉāṉa kāṭuveṭṭikaḷ prasātakāṇiyākap peṟṟa nila
māy Ivarpakkalum melveṭṭappeṟāṉa civapātacekaranallū[rilumjaṉa]nātapurat
tu cetikulamāṇikkattu perumpaḷḷikkum kaṅkakulacuntarapperum paḷḷikkum pa
ḷḷiccantam Iḷaiyāṉkuṭiyilum Iḷaiyāṉkuṭaiyāṉ kāṟāyil poṉ
ṉampalakkūttaṉāṉa kaṇṭarātittappallavaraiyaṉ pakkalum vilaikoṇṭa pramā
ṇappaṭi nilamāy Ittevar tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka kuṭuttu niṅkalāka I
ṭṭu kūṭukiṟa nilattukku Ūrkaṇakku Āṉaiccūḻuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttiṭṭa kaṇakkup
paṭi nilamāy muṉpuṭaiyārum paḻamperum Iḷaiyāṉ kuṭiyil niṉṟum kūṭuki
ṟa nilam paḷḷiccanta Iṟaiyili ṉaiccūḻ niṉṟum kūṭukiṟa
nilam parikkirakattārkkuk kuṭi Iruppāy varkku tirunāmattukkāṇi yāka Iṭṭu va
rukiṟapaṭiyum tavirntu yāṇṭu patiṉāṟāvatu mutal kūṭiṉa Āṉaiccūḻp parikki
rakattāraik kuṭiiruppu māṟiṉa Ivvūrk kollainilam Araikku muṉpu Ūril tiruna
ṉtavana Opāti kāṇikkaṭaṉ nellu muppatiṉ kalaṉe Eḻukuṟuṇi nāṉāḻi Uri Iṟaikaṭ
ṭuc curuṅki muṉpu Iṟuttu varukiṟa nellu muppatiṉ kalaṉe Irutūṇi kuṟuṇi
pattāṟākki nellu patiṉeṇkalaṉe Aiṅkuṟuṇi Aiññāḻi 200 kā
cu Iraṇṭu mākkāṇiyiṉāl nellu Aiṅkuṟuṇi muṉṉāḻi Uḻakku Akkam Araiye nālumā
kkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉāl nellu Aiṅkuṟuṇi muṉṉāḻi Uḻakku Āka nel laṟu
patteṇkalaṉe tūṇināṉāḻi niccayitta nellu Irupattu mukkalaṉe kuṟuṇi Oru
nāḻi nel veṭṭappeṟāṉa civapātacekaranallūril nilam Orumā muntirikaiyiṉāl nilaopāti kāṇi
kkaṭaṉ nellu nāṟkalaṉe patakku muṉṉāḻi pattāṟākki nellu Irukalaṉe tūṇi
patakku Irunāḻi Uḻakku niccayitta Opātinellu ṉnāḻi Uri Iḷai yāṉ kuṭiyil nila
m Orumāvarai Araikkāṇiyiṉāl nilam Opāti paḻaviṟainellu nāṟ kalaṉe tūṇipatakku Aṟu
nāḻi Uḻakku Irācentiracoḻatevarkku paṉṉiraṇṭāvatu O(ru) pāti nellu tūṇi patakku
Aṟunāḻi muḻakkāḻākku Āka nellu Aiṅkalaṉe kuṟuṇi Aiññāḻi Uri Āḻākku niccayitta Opā
ti nellu Aiṅkalaṉe kuṟuṇi Aiññāḻiuri Āḻākku Āka nilam nālaraiye Irumāva
raiye Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉāl nellu nāṟkalaṉe tūṇipatakku Aṟunāḻiyu
muḻakku makaviṟai Ilāta nilattāṟ kāṇikkaṭaṉ nellu nāṟkalaṉe patakku muṉ
ṉāḻi Uri Āḻākkuṉāl pattāṟākki nellu Irukalaṉe tūṇipatakku Irunāḻi Uḻakku
Ivaiuruccuruṅki muṉpu Iṟuttu varukiṟa nellu nāṉūṟṟumukkalaṉe
Uriyiṉāl pattāṟākki nellu Irunūṟṟu nāṟpatte
Uri kācu Oṉṟe Eḻumākkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉāl nel
nāḻi Akkam pattemukkāle Orumāvaraiye A
nellu Aṟukalaṉe Irutūṇi kuṟuṇi Irunāḻiyaṟa� nellu
tūṇippatakkaṟunāḻi muvuḻakkāḻākku Āka nellu ṟupatte
ḻiṉāl pattāṟākki nellu Irukalaṉe tūṇipatakku Iru
nāḻi Uḻakku Iṟaikaṭṭuc curuṅki muṉpu Iṟuttu varukiṟa nel
lu Eḻukalaṉe mukkuṟuṇi kaṟunāḻi Uḻakkiṉāl pa
tta toṉ kalaṉe Irutūṇi Aṟunāḻi Urik kācu
a ṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻaraiye Irumāvarai
ṉāl nellu Irukalaṉe patakkiru nāḻi muvuḻakku Akka
m nālemuṉṟu mākkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻ mukkāliṉāl nellu Irukalaṉe Eḻuku
ṟuṇi Irunāḻi Uḻakkāḻākku payireṟṟiṉa nilattāl nellu tūṇip patakkaṟunāḻi muvuḻak
kāḻākku Āka nellu nūṟṟeḻukalaṉe patakku muṉṉāḻi Uḻakkāḻākku niccayitta nellu
nūṟṟirupattu Aṟukalaṉe tūṇippatakkeḻunāḻi Uḻakkāḻākku nikki nilam Iraṇṭarai
ye Irumāvarai Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉāl kāṇikkaṭaṉ nellu Iru nūṟṟunāṟpat
tu mukkalaṉe Irutūṇikkuṟuṇi nāṉāḻi muvuḻakku
tu varukiṟa nellu Irunūṟṟu nāṟpatteṇkalaṉe patakkirunāḻi Uḻakki ṉāl pattāṟākki ne
llu nūṟṟu nāṟpatteḻukalaṉe kuṟuṇi Irunāḻi kācu mukkāle Oru mākkāṇi mun
tirikaikkiḻ Eḻumākkāṇi Araikkāṇiyiṉāl nellu mukkalaṉe tūṇi muṉṉāḻi Uḻa
kku Akkam Āṟaraiye muṉṟu mā Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻk kāli ṉāl nellu nā
ṟkalaṉe kuṟuṇi Eḻunāḻi Uri Āḻākku Āka muppattu nāṟkalaṉe Eḻuku
ṟuṇi nāṉāḻi muvuḻakkāḻākku niccayitta nellu nūṟṟeṇpattumukkala ṉe Irutū
ṇikkuṟuṇi Eḻunāḻi muvuḻakku ḥ Ivai nāyakam pantaṉainallūru
ṭaiyārum kurukāṭikiḻaiyārum lluṭaiyārum
puravari cikaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi kumāra kiḻavarum peru
maṅkalamuṭaiyārum kuma ṉāṭuṭaiyārum
kāṭavarāyarum Ilāṭattaraiyarum nuḷamparāyarum Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvarip paṭi .
The following piece seems to be connected with the above inscription, though the sequence is not known.

—yitakku niccayitta nellu muṉṉūṟṟu Oru
—eḻunāḻi Āḻākku Ittevar tirumaṭai
—mum kāveriyil niṉṟum tirumañcaṇam varava
—nilamāy Iṟai lāy varukiṟapaṭi
—rupattañcāvatu mutal vari
—ṭaṉ nilam nikki nikki niṉṟa nilattu nilam
—ṉa muntirikaiyiṉāl nilavopāti kāṇikkaṭa
—pattaṟukalaṉe kuṟuṇi
—tuvarukiṟa poti nellu
—kkiṉāl pattāṟākki nellu Eḻu
—eṇmāvarai Araikkāṇi muntirikaik
—ṇiyiṉāl nellu kalaṉe Irutūṇi
—ṉkiḻmukkāliṉāl nellu Irukalaṉe ku
—lu Eṇpatiṉ kalaṉe kuṟuṇi Eḻunāḻi Uriāḻākku
—toṇṇūṟṟu Aiṅkalaṉe mukkuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiu
—āka Iṭṭu kaṭṭiṉa Āṉaiccūḻpparikkirakattārai ku
—kollai nilam Araiyiṉāl kūṭiṉa kāṇikkaṭaṉ
—eḻukuṟuṇi ṉānāḻi Uri Iṟai Iṭṭuccuruṅka muṉ tā
—muppatiṉkalaṉe Irutūṇikkuṟuṇi ṉānāḻi Uriyiṉāl
—kalaṉe Aiṅkuṟuṇi Aiññāḻi Uri kācu Iraṇṭumākkā
—ṟuṇi muṉnāḻi Uḻakku Akkam Araiye nālumākkā
—yivai nellu Aiṅkuṟuṇi muṉṉāḻi Uḻakku Āka nellu
—ṇināṉāḻi niccayitta nellu Irupattumukkalaṉe kuṟuṇi Oru
—ṉa civapātacekaranallūril nilam Orumā muntirikaiyiṉāl kū
—nāṟkalaṉe patakkumuṉṉāḻi Uri Āḻākkuṉāl pattāṟā
—tūṇippatakku Irunāḻi Āḻākku niccayitta nellumu
—yāṉ kuṭiyil nilamorumāarai Araikkāṇiyiṉāl
—kalaṉe tūṇippatakku Aṟunāḻi muvuḻakku paṟṟeṟṟiṉa ne
—muvuḻakkāḻākku Āka nellu Aiṅkalaṉe kuṟuṇi
—yittanellu Aiṅkalaṉe kuṟuṇi Aiññāḻi Uri Āḻākku
—nallu nāṟkalaṉe tūṇippatakkaṟunāḻi muvuḻakku paḻaviṟai
—nellu nāṟkalaṉe patakkumuṉṉāḻi Uri Āḻā
Digital edition of SII 23.392 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
